measure.detail: 30/30 exported components have importable usage examples; missing: none

findings.fix: Add one canonical story/example per component.
findings.receipt: Agents recreate components they can't see used (Atlassian DESIGN.md experiment).

measure.detail: 70/70 example component imports resolve against exported components; unresolved: none

findings.fix: Correct or delete examples with dead imports.
findings.receipt: Wrong import paths are a documented agent failure mode (Astryx self-checks).

measure.detail: 30/30 exports typecheck from a synthetic package import; unresolved: none

findings.fix: Repair the package types/exports mapping so every public export is importable.
findings.receipt: Wrong import paths are a documented agent failure mode.

measure.detail: 0 known-deprecated exports found; deprecation marks are not applicable.

findings.fix: Add @deprecated to legacy exports.
findings.receipt: Deprecated patterns dominate training data unless current source clearly marks them as deprecated.

measure.detail: 3/3 metadata code examples import system components; rebuild examples: none

findings.fix: Rewrite metadata examples to import the design-system components instead of re-implementing them.
findings.receipt: Re-implementation specs cause agents to recreate components instead of using the system.

measure.detail: 29/30 exported components have documented public props; missing: TextField

findings.fix: Add TSDoc descriptions to public props, starting with the most-used components.
findings.receipt: Agents invent props when public prop contracts lack descriptions.

measure.detail: 16 exported symbols have no documentation evidence: CardSectionProps, compositionTemplates, MetricCardProps, recipe, RecipeConfig, RecipeResult, StatDelta, StatDeltaDirection, StatusPillProps, ToastApi, ToastOptions, ToastProviderProps, ToastRegionProps, ToastVariant, VariantMap, VariantProps; documentation evidence resolved via file: Button via packages/react/src/Button.stories.tsx, formDialogTemplate via packages/react/src/composition-templates.stories.tsx, IconButton via packages/react/src/IconButton.stories.tsx, templateExamples via packages/react/src/canonical-examples.test.tsx, TextField via packages/react/src/TextField.stories.tsx, ToastMessage via packages/react/src/Toast.stories.tsx; incidental mentions ignored: compositionTemplates via docs/ds-bench-audits/cedar-ui-improvement-log.md, recipe via docs/adr/0005-component-api-conventions.md, RecipeConfig via docs/ds-bench-audits/cedar-ui-improvement-log.md, RecipeResult via docs/ds-bench-audits/cedar-ui-improvement-log.md, VariantMap via docs/ds-bench-audits/cedar-ui-improvement-log.md, VariantProps via docs/ds-bench-audits/cedar-ui-improvement-log.md

findings.fix: Document or un-export undocumented public exports.
findings.receipt: Undocumented public exports are trap surface for agents choosing from the design system.

measure.detail: 0/28 exported component props use any/unknown; offenders: none

findings.fix: Replace any/unknown props with precise public prop types.
findings.receipt: Hallucinated-prop detection depends on sound public prop types.

measure.detail: 3 component name carrier mismatches: MetricCard source file packages/react/src/Stat.tsx, Radio source file packages/react/src/RadioGroup.tsx, StatusPill source file packages/react/src/Badge.tsx

findings.fix: Align component names across source files, stories, and manifest entries.
findings.receipt: Name mismatch drives discovery-driven component recreation.

measure.detail: 30/30 exported components include when-to-use guidance; missing: none

findings.fix: Add when-to-use/when-not sections to component docs.
findings.receipt: Agents must choose components, not just call them (Atlassian recreation finding).

measure.detail: 56/73 alternatives/instead component references resolve to exported components; unresolved: Link, ToggleButton, Menu, Select, Disclosure, TextArea, SearchField, Accordion

findings.fix: Reference real components in alternatives guidance.
findings.receipt: Resolvable cross-references can't be faked by boilerplate.

measure.detail: 2/2 detected confusable pairs reference each other; missing: none

findings.fix: Add mutual "use X instead when..." notes.
findings.receipt: Wrong-component selection is a recurring design-system agent failure mode.

measure.detail: 11 magic values across 1174 style LOC (0.937 per 100 LOC); token references: 406; offenders: 100 in packages/react/src/Dialog.module.css:10, rgb(0 0 0 / 35%) in packages/react/src/Dialog.module.css:44, 1rem in packages/react/src/IconButton.module.css:41, 1rem in packages/react/src/IconButton.module.css:42, 1.25rem in packages/react/src/IconButton.module.css:49, 1.25rem in packages/react/src/IconButton.module.css:50, 1.5rem in packages/react/src/IconButton.module.css:57, 1.5rem in packages/react/src/IconButton.module.css:58, 110 in packages/react/src/Toast.module.css:5, rgb(0 0 0 / 35%) in packages/react/src/Toast.module.css:33, 100 in packages/react/src/Tooltip.module.css:8

findings.fix: Replace named hardcoded colors, spacing, and z-index values with token references.
findings.receipt: Agents imitate the system's own styling habits; hardcoded source values become copied output.

measure.detail: 30/30 token sources are present and parseable; invalid: none

findings.fix: Publish tokens in a machine-readable format.
findings.receipt: Machine-readable tokens are the theming signal agents can consume.

measure.detail: 0 @deprecated marks found; migration notes are not applicable (deprecation.marked carries unmarked deprecations).

findings.fix: Append replacement guidance to every @deprecated mark.
findings.receipt: A bare deprecation mark does not redirect an agent away from deprecated training-data gravity.

measure.detail: 0 deprecated components found; manifest deprecation signalling is not applicable.

findings.fix: Tag deprecated entries in the manifest or exclude them from generated agent metadata.
findings.receipt: Manifest-level deprecation signalling keeps deprecated components out of agent-first metadata paths.

measure.detail: 2/2 agent context component references resolve against exported components; dead references: none

findings.fix: Regenerate or correct stale component references in agent context files.
findings.receipt: Stale context misleads agents worse than no context.

measure.detail: 30/30 exported components are covered by a manifest; missing: none

findings.fix: Generate or complete the component manifest.
findings.receipt: Partial manifests force agents to guess the gaps.

measure.detail: 4 components are deep-import-only and missing from the root barrel: AsyncStatePanelTemplateExample, FilterableTableTemplateExample, FormDialogTemplateExample, SettingsPageTemplateExample

findings.fix: Re-export deep-only components from the root barrel or document deep paths in agent metadata.
findings.receipt: Agents guess deep paths when components are not reachable from the root package import.

measure.detail: 2/375 token names violate carrier-local dominant patterns (DTCG JSON: 2/369 dot-kebab; CSS custom properties: 0/6 kebab); offenders: base.font.lineHeight.tight, base.font.lineHeight.normal

findings.fix: Rename token outliers to the dominant pattern.
findings.receipt: Inconsistent names invite fabricated tokens.

measure.detail: 2 barrel exports are absent from docs/stories: compositionTemplates, recipe; docs/story presence resolved via file: Badge via packages/react/src/Badge.stories.tsx, badgeMeta via packages/react/src/Badge.stories.tsx, Box via packages/react/src/Box.stories.tsx, boxMeta via packages/react/src/Box.stories.tsx, Button via packages/react/src/Button.stories.tsx, buttonMeta via packages/react/src/Button.stories.tsx, Card via packages/react/src/Card.stories.tsx, CardBody via packages/react/src/Card.stories.tsx, CardFooter via packages/react/src/Card.stories.tsx, CardHeader via packages/react/src/Card.stories.tsx, cardMeta via packages/react/src/Card.stories.tsx, Checkbox via packages/react/src/Checkbox.stories.tsx, checkboxMeta via packages/react/src/Checkbox.stories.tsx, Dialog via packages/react/src/Dialog.stories.tsx, dialogMeta via packages/react/src/Dialog.stories.tsx, formDialogTemplate via packages/react/src/composition-templates.stories.tsx, Heading via packages/react/src/Heading.stories.tsx, headingMeta via packages/react/src/Heading.stories.tsx, IconButton via packages/react/src/IconButton.stories.tsx, iconButtonMeta via packages/react/src/IconButton.stories.tsx (+34 more); incidental mentions ignored: compositionTemplates via docs/ds-bench-audits/cedar-ui-improvement-log.md, recipe via docs/adr/0005-component-api-conventions.md

findings.fix: Document, deprecate, or remove zombie exports.
findings.receipt: Zombie exports are trap surface for training-data gravity.

measure.detail: 6/6 llms.txt references are valid; invalid references: none

findings.fix: Add or repair llms.txt references.
findings.receipt: llms.txt is a contested convention, so it is weighted low but still captures discovery intent.

measure.detail: 1 MCP package/config carriers detected: packages/mcp/package.json dependency @modelcontextprotocol/sdk

findings.fix: Consider shipping an MCP server or checked-in MCP configuration for agent context.
findings.receipt: On-demand context delivery can outperform portable files for agent workflows.
